title: More Striders Pack
description: Bringing new Strider variants to the Nether
body:
![Title saying "More Striders Pack" written in the Minecraft style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6a97ed17db0c8add51c417da7b075e238bb6e68.png)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qm756RAzTgA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**More Striders Pack** contains four new biome dependent Strider textures! Including cold variants as well!

**All the striders:**
Soulsand Valley, Basalt Deltas, Crimson Forest, Warped Forest, Albino Strider

_You can also change the fungus on a stick to the crimson one!_
